title: Create Convenient Automation
description: Over 50 Create recipes that I consider suitable for early stage of the game.
body:
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd380efd722f5ff06943c6d18dc08dceab216858.jpeg)

1. Over 50 create recipes that are balance except : You're able to obtain blaze rod/blaze powder/soul sand and able to craft blaze burner without going to the Nether.
2. Two different mixing and compacting recipes for crimsite/veridum/ashurine/ochrum
3. Added mixing recipes for diorite by mixing 1 Quartz with 1 Cobblestone
4. The ability to craft Creative Blaze Cake that requires a lot of Diamonds .*As far as I concern, I add diamond recipe from crushing Experience Block with 0.01 chance.
5. The ability to compact Coals and Stone into Coal Ore
6. The ability to mix 1 Gravel and 1 Diorite into Limestone
7. The ability to compact 16 Cobblestones with Water into Tuff
8. The ability to mix 1 gravel, 1 iron nugget and water into Redstone
9. The ability to wash netherack into Redstone and Gold Nugget
10. The ability to wash Iron Nugget into Copper Nugget
11. The ability to compact 4 Leaves into 1 Moss Block
12. The ability to Spout Water into Grass Block to make Moss Block
13. And many more vanilla lore friendly Create recipes
